title: Domain Errors, State, and Resource Lifecycles · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: Keep loan state transitions, storage sessions, and notification failures recoverable and observable. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a stateful failure-resilient service and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model allowed states and transitions explicitly so every method preserves domain invariants.
Define a small domain error hierarchy that communicates recoverable business failures without leaking infrastructure details.
Translate storage, network, and parsing failures at ownership boundaries while preserving causes for operators.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
